questions.question: What happens to files placed in the public/ directory vs assets/?
options: Both are processed by the bundler with hashing
public/ is bundled, assets/ is served as-is
public/ is served as-is at the root URL; assets/ is processed by the bundler
There is no difference between the two directories

options: It is ignored: only the filename matters
A suffix appended after the filename
A prefix prepended to the filename
